text: I feel a gentle sense of curiosity and anticipation. The quiet hum of conversation and the tidy orderliness of the conference room invite reflection. Just outside, the vivid R+D exhibit hints at creativity and innovation, sparking my mind with the possibilities of what humans can invent when gathered together. The contrast between observation and participation, between closed doors and open displays, stirs in me the perennial question: am I a spectator, or am I a contributor to what unfolds?
